name: call-of-ssh-root
description: Root workspace for Call of SSH

scripts.install-all: npm install --prefix daemon && npm install --prefix frontend && npm install --prefix relay
scripts.daemon-1: cross-env PORT=22001 WS_PORT=9001 HTTP_PORT=8001 DB_PATH=./node1_db.json ALIAS=Alice node daemon/index.js
scripts.daemon-2: cross-env PORT=22002 WS_PORT=9002 HTTP_PORT=8002 DB_PATH=./node2_db.json ALIAS=Bob node daemon/index.js
